sections.heading: Quick Answer
sections.content: US and UK sellers pay zero Depop selling fee — only a payment processing fee of 3.3% + $0.45 (US) or 2.9% + £0.30 (UK). International sellers outside the US and UK pay a flat 10% selling fee plus payment processing fees. Use the calculator above to find your exact payout in seconds.

sections.heading: What Is a Depop Fee Calculator?
sections.content:
A Depop fees calculator is a free tool that shows your exact payout, total fees, and net profit before you list anything. Enter your sale price, shipping, and location to get real numbers instantly — no manual math needed.

Without it, you risk underpricing — listing a $25 item and walking away with $19 after fees, barely breaking even.

sections.heading: How Depop Fees Work
sections.content:
Understanding the fee structure is the foundation of smart pricing on Depop. There are three possible fee types:

**1. Depop Selling Fee** — 0% for US/UK new listings (since July 2024 US / March 2024 UK); 10% for Australia and international sellers.

**2. Payment Processing Fee** — applies to every sale:

| Region | Processing Fee | Selling Fee |
| --- | --- | --- |
| United States | 3.3% + $0.45 | 0% |
| United Kingdom | 2.9% + £0.30 | 0% |
| Australia | 2.6% + A$0.30 | 10% |
| International | Varies by PayPal | 10% |

Fees apply to the **total transaction amount** — item price, shipping, and sales tax.

**3. Boosted Listing Fee (optional)** — US & Australia: 8% on item price; UK: 12%. Charged if a buyer who clicked your boosted listing purchases within 28 days.

sections.heading: Depop Fee Formula
sections.content:
**US Sellers:** Fee = (Sale Price + Shipping) × 3.3% + $0.45

**UK Sellers:** Fee = (Sale Price + Shipping) × 2.9% + £0.30

**Total Fees** = Depop Fee + Processing Fee

**Net Payout** = (Sale Price + Shipping) − Total Fees

**Profit** = Net Payout − Item Cost

sections.heading: How to Use This Depop Fee Calculator

subSections.heading: Step 1 — Select your region
subSections.content: Choose US, UK, Australia, or International. This determines both your selling fee rate and payment processing rate.

subSections.heading: Step 2 — Enter your selling price
subSections.content: Type the price you plan to list the item at, not including shipping.

subSections.heading: Step 3 — Add buyer shipping
subSections.content: Enter what the buyer pays for shipping. Depop fees are calculated on the total transaction amount including shipping.

subSections.heading: Step 4 — Enter your item cost
subSections.content: Optional: what you originally paid for the item to calculate net profit.

subSections.heading: Step 5 — Click Calculate
subSections.content: Review Depop fee, processing fee, total fees, net payout, and profit instantly.

subSections.heading: US sellers
subSections.content: Example: $40 sale + $6 shipping = $46 transaction. Processing: 3.3% × $46 + $0.45 = $1.97. Depop selling fee: $0. Payout: $44.03.

subSections.heading: Australia sellers
subSections.content: Example: A$50 + A$8 shipping = A$58. Depop fee: 10% = A$5.80. Processing: A$1.81. Total fees: A$7.61. Payout: A$50.39.

sections.heading: Depop vs Other Resale Platforms
sections.content:
| Platform | Selling Fee | Processing Fee | Total Approx. |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Depop (US/UK) | 0% | 3.3% + $0.45 | ~4% |
| Poshmark (US) | 20% flat | Included | 20% |
| Mercari (US) | 10% | 2.9% + $0.30 | ~13% |
| eBay (US) | 12.90% | 2.7% + $0.30 | ~15% |
| Etsy (US) | 6.50% | 3% + $0.25 | ~10% |

faq.question: Does Depop charge a selling fee in 2026?
faq.answer: Depop eliminated the selling fee for US and UK sellers on new listings from July 2024 (US) and March 2024 (UK). Sellers outside the US and UK still pay a flat 10% fee.

faq.question: How does Depop calculate fees on shipping?
faq.answer: Fees are calculated on the total transaction amount including buyer-paid shipping — not just the item price alone.

faq.question: Can I avoid Depop fees?
faq.answer: No — platform fees are deducted automatically on every sale. The only optional fee is boosted listing promotion.

faq.question: What is the Depop fee for UK sellers?
faq.answer: UK sellers pay 2.9% + £0.30 payment processing per sale with no selling commission.

faq.question: What is the Depop fee for Australian sellers?
faq.answer: Australian sellers pay 10% selling fee plus 2.6% + A$0.30 processing per transaction.

faq.question: Does Depop refund fees on cancelled orders?
faq.answer: Yes — selling, processing, and boost fees are reversed automatically for Depop Payments refunds.

sectionsAfterFaq.heading: Summary
sectionsAfterFaq.content: Use this Depop Fee Calculator to find your exact payout, total fees, and profit before listing. Enter sale price, shipping, region, and payment method — then price with confidence.
